intro: Our coverage of Microsoft over the last ten days, from April 12 to April 21, 2026, comprises 37 articles. The reporting details a global threat landscape, with notable activity in Canada and Japan targeting multiple sectors including education, enterprise, and federal government. The threat actor Storm-2755 was prominently observed. Key vulnerabilities exploited include CVE-2026-33104 and CVE-2026-34054, both with a CVSS of 7.8, alongside CVE-2026-26179, CVE-2026-32183, and CVE-2026-32201. Of the incidents cataloged, the severity mix included five critical and eighteen high-severity events.
